calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-28-2012 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-07-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Greer Smith for Machael Boswell, Sr.

Shelly Cunnignham appeared at 9:00 a.m. and was advised by the Clerk to return at 10:30 a.m. as Bruce King had requested to appear by court call. Mr. King did not make an appearance and Ms. Cunningham did not return. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-08-2010 Continued To Jan-04-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Greer Smith for the Proposed Executor. Shelly Cunningham (Grandaughter) in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that no one appeared by courtcall. Ms. Cunningham requested a continuance stating that she was working with Legal Aid in obtaining representation and presented her objections. The matter was continued to January 4, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Ms. Cunningham that her formal objections to the petition needed to be on file.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-10-2010 Continued To Dec-08-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Shelley Cunningham (Grandaughter) in Propria Persona.

This was a pre-granted matter. Ms. Cunningham stated that she was objecting to the petition and that she was going to obtain Counsel. The matter was continued to December 8, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Anasse.
